items.definition_en: A thin, slotted spatula designed for turning fish fillets.
items.example_en: She used a fish spatula to gently flip the salmon.

items.definition_en: A hand tool that presses boiled potatoes through small holes.
items.example_en: The potato ricer made the mashed potatoes extra smooth.

items.definition_en: A large fork with prongs for serving and lifting pasta.
items.example_en: She used a pasta fork to serve the spaghetti.

items.definition_en: A utensil for serving portions of ice cream.
items.example_en: He reached for the ice cream scoop after dinner.

items.definition_en: A tool with a heavy head for softening meat.
items.example_en: She used a meat tenderizer to pound the chicken breasts.

items.definition_en: A round, rotating blade for slicing pizza.
items.example_en: He used a pizza cutter to divide the pizza into slices.

items.definition_en: A device to cut a hard-boiled egg into even slices.
items.example_en: The egg slicer made neat slices for the salad.

items.definition_en: A small tool for grating citrus fruit rind.
items.example_en: She used a zester to add lemon flavor to the cake.

items.definition_en: A small scoop to make round balls from fruit like melon.
items.example_en: He used a melon baller to decorate the fruit salad.

items.definition_en: A large spoon for pouring liquids over food while cooking.
items.example_en: She grabbed a basting spoon to keep the meat moist.

items.definition_en: A flat utensil for turning food during cooking.
items.example_en: He used a turner to flip the pancakes.

items.definition_en: A fine, handheld grater for zest and hard cheese.
items.example_en: She used a microplane grater for the Parmesan cheese.

items.definition_en: A device to dry washed salad leaves using spinning.
items.example_en: The salad spinner removed water from the lettuce.

items.definition_en: A flat, holey spoon used to skim food from hot liquids.
items.example_en: He used a skimmer to remove dumplings from the soup.

items.definition_en: A tool for removing the core from apples.
items.example_en: She used an apple corer for her pie recipe.

items.definition_en: A small device to separate egg yolks from whites.
items.example_en: The egg separator made baking easier.

items.definition_en: A hand tool for mixing fat into flour for dough.
items.example_en: She used a pastry blender to make the biscuit dough.

items.definition_en: A flat tool for scraping and cutting dough.
items.example_en: He used a dough scraper to clean the work surface.

items.definition_en: A small, rotating blade for cutting dough strips.
items.example_en: She cut the pie crust with a pastry wheel.

items.definition_en: A pitcher that separates fat from meat juices or gravy.
items.example_en: He poured the drippings into a gravy separator.
